Dhiyaŋu-bitjarra-yinyi yurru walal bunana dhäwu'nha romŋura maŋutjiŋura bäyŋu yurru ŋäthinyarawuynydja ŋayi yaka dhawar'yirri beŋuru 20 minitjawu bäyŋu yurru ŋäthinyarawuynydja ŋayi dhuwali walŋangu wäthurru bäyŋu yurru ŋäthinyarawuynydja ŋayi guŋga'yunana buku-nyilŋ'ŋura.

topics.title: Gaarrwa’yun (Syncope)
topics.summary: Gaarrwa’yun dhuwal' buḻwaŋgu'yun yätjŋu walalaŋguŋ mirithirra walalŋuŋ. Gaarrwa’yun dhuwal' buḻwaŋgu'yun walŋa yätjŋu, yarrata' manymak muka walalaŋguŋ. Dhuwali gaarrwa’yun muka dhuwal' buḻwaŋgu'yun yätjŋu walalaŋguŋ mirithirra walalŋuŋ. Ma' gulŋunmirra. Walŋa yätjŋu muka ŋunhi gaarrwa’yun muka dhuwal' buḻwaŋgu'yun yätjŋu. Ma' gulŋunmirra. Walŋa yätjŋu muka ŋunhi gaarrwa’yun muka dhuwal' buḻwaŋgu'yun yätjŋu. Ma' gulŋunmirra.

topics.title: Gaŋga
topics.summary: Djarrpi miyalknha gaŋgany'tjaŋbalaŋamirri yurru dhukarryunna wäŋalili wambatjirrwu, ga bäyŋu djuripi'yunna rirrakaynyana gapu ga maḻŋ'marama gaŋga', ŋurruŋu. Gaŋga warraŋul – guyaŋunha bäyŋu wuṉḏaŋ'thurruna, waḻuŋ gaŋga – dhunupan yukurra rirrakaynyana ŋäŋ'thurruna ambulance.

topics.title: Djälma
topics.summary: Gaḻa yukurra ŋamathaŋa, goŋmirri yukurra marrtji gaḻaŋura, djuḻkuluŋu wata yukurra nhäma 20 minitthu, dhuḏi'yunna djaṉaŋ gaḻaŋuru djämamirri, gapu djarr'yunna ḏumurru', yaka dhurrwaraŋganana djalma. Yakaŋuru djalma gurrupan warray gaṉaŋ'maraŋga'warrŋga, liŋgu yukurra nhäma rumbalwuy gaṉaŋ'maraŋga'warrŋga walalaŋgu waḻkura'walalŋga'wuy.

topics.title: Wirrku' Naḻa Yoindi'mirri
topics.summary: Waḻiki wirrku' naḻa rom-dhuŋana, dhupmarama walala guḻku' ga dhä-yurruŋu. Ga wirrku' yukurra ga beŋuruḻi walala wirrku' ga baḻarrawu beŋuruḻi mala ga ŋayaŋu. Ga goŋmirri walala wirrku' djämawuy ga goŋmirri walala wirrku' djämawuy yukurra ga malanu mala ga rom-dhuŋana. Ga guḻku' ga dhupmarama walala wirrku' ga baḻarrawu ga wirrku' ga ŋuliŋuru, djämawuy yukurra ga rom-dhuŋana walala.

topics.title: Ŋäthiliŋu Narkul
topics.summary: Ŋäthilimirriŋuwu, gay' nherra' ŋäthi ŋulaŋuru wiripuŋuwuy ga djurana ga wänaŋuru, ga yaka djalkthun ŋulaŋuru ŋäthililili. Biyi'na walal bili ŋäthili ga wäna 000-nha. Ga ŋäthilimirriŋuwu ŋulaŋuru ŋathaŋuru, maḻaw wäna ŋulaŋuru djurana ga wäna 20 miniwumu ga wäna ŋulaŋuru ambulancethe.

topics.title: Djälkimirri Ngurru-ḻurrkun' (Electric Shock)
topics.summary: Ga' ga' yäkuyu yindiku wäwa'yunamirri ngalinduku yindi manymakthu. Bitjanarawuyyi, ga' ŋäthinyi DRSABCD, ga' ŋäthinyiya 000, ga' ŋäthinyi djäma mirrny'tjunawuyyi ga' ŋäthinyi wäwa'yunarawuyyi. Ga' yaka yäkuyu dhäkay-djärryunmirri, ga' yindi manymakthu djämanydja wukirri. Ga' manymakthu nhakun dhipuḻa yindi dhäkay-djärryunawuyyi ga' djälkimirri ngurru-ḻurrkun' wukirriyi dhukarr-manapanmirriwalanydja.
